marshallese.neptune_s_winds_reach_2_100_km_h: Kōto ko an Neptune rej tōpar 2,100 km/h!
marshallese.earth_s_magnetic_field_deflects_charge: Bukwōn magnet an Laḷ ej kōjepḷaak menin aḷ ko rewōr charge. Ozone ej jipañ kōn UV, ak magnetosphere eo ej likōkḷaḷ eḷaptata!
marshallese.the_iau_s_2006_definition_requires_pla: Naan in kōmeḷeḷe an IAU ilo 2006 ej aikuj bwe planet ren karreoiki iaḷ in doulul eo aer jān menin ko jet.
marshallese.also_called_the_goldilocks_zone_not_to: Barāinwōt rej ba "Goldilocks zone" — ejjab māāṇāṇ otem māāṇāṇ, ejjab piọ otem piọ, bwe dān en dān ioon.
marshallese.the_moon_rotates_exactly_once_per_orbi: Allōñ ej ukōt make juon alen ilo juon doulul — lokjak in ej waḷọk jān kajoor in ibwijleplep ilo bilien iiō.
marshallese.opportunity_rover_found_hematite_blueb: Rover eo Opportunity ear lo "blueberry" in hematite — dekā ko rej waḷọk wōt ilo dān. Pija ko jān mejatoto rej kwaḷọk delta in river ko ṃor!
marshallese.venus_is_hotter_462_c_vs_430_c_mercury: Venus emāāṇāṇḷọk (462°C ippān 430°C)! Ejjeḷọk an Mercury mejatoto ñan dāpij māāṇāṇ. Greenhouse effect eo eḷapḷọk tokjān jān tōḷọk.
marshallese.gas_giants_have_no_solid_surface_they_: Ejjeḷọk an gas giant ko ioon epen! Rej eḷaptata hydrogen im helium gas eo ej eddoḷọk wōt ñan lukwōn eo. Juon probe enaaj wanlaḷḷọk im ejjeḷọk jeṃḷọken.
marshallese.earth_s_distance_from_the_sun_doesn_t_: Tōḷọk an Laḷ jān Aḷ ejjab oktak ilo raan. Raelep ej meḷeḷein bwe Aḷ ej utiejtata ilo mejatoto eo aṃ. Laḷ epaaktata ilo Jānwōde (perihelion)!
marshallese.jupiter_is_11x_wider_than_earth_and_1_: Jupiter ej 11 alen depakpakḷọk jān Laḷ, im 1,300 Laḷ remaroñ deḷọñ ilowaan! Solar system ewōr an āinjuon eḷap ilo joñan.
marshallese.pluto_is_still_in_the_solar_system_it_: Pluto ej pād wōt ilo solar system! Raar ukōt jān "planet" ñan "dwarf planet" ilo 2006, ak ej doulul wōt Aḷ.
marshallese.the_asteroid_belt_is_mostly_empty_spac: Ṃōttan asteroid eo eḷaptata ej jikin ejjeḷọk! Tōḷọk ikōtaan asteroid ko ej milien km. Wa in mejatoto rej ilām im ejjeḷọk uwōta.
marshallese.not_always_saturn_is_95x_earth_s_mass_: Jab iien otemjej! Saturn ej 95 alen eddoḷọk jān Laḷ ak gravity ioon ej 1.06g wōt kōnke eḷap im edik eddo eo an. Eddo ej pād ioon eddo IM depakpakin.
marshallese.all_parts_of_the_moon_receive_sunlight: Aolep ṃōttan Allōñ rej bōk meram jān aḷ! "Turin ettoḷọk" ej jimattan eo jejjab maroñ loe jān Laḷ kōn tidal locking. Ej bōk joñan wōt aḷ.
marshallese.the_habitable_zone_or_goldilocks_zone_: Bukwōn in mour (ak "Goldilocks zone") ej tōḷọk ko jān juon iju ijo dān emaroñ pād ioon juon planet. Ilo solar system eo ad, Venus ej pād ilo tōrerein lowaan, Laḷ ej pād ilo lukwōn, im Mars ej pād ilo tōrerein ālikin. Ak ñan dān, kwōj aikuj barāinwōt mejatoto im bukwōn magnet ejiṃwe!
marshallese.when_sunlight_heats_a_planet_s_surface: Ñe meram in aḷ ej kaōnḷọk ioon juon planet, ioon ej jilkinḷọk māāṇāṇ (infrared). Gas in greenhouse (CO₂, CH₄, H₂O) rej bōk māāṇāṇ in im bar jilkinḷọk, im kaōnḷọk planet eo. Greenhouse an Laḷ ej +33°C (ej lale mour). An Venus ej +510°C (ejjab bōjrak). Enañin ejjeḷọk an Mars (-60°C). Joñan gas in greenhouse ej kōṃṃan jeṃḷọken!
marshallese.a_planet_s_magnetic_field_creates_a_ma: Bukwōn magnet an juon planet ej kōṃṃan juon "magnetosphere" — juon likōkḷaḷ jejjab loe eo ej kōjepḷaak kōto in aḷ (menin ewōr charge jān Aḷ). Magnetosphere an Laḷ ej kōjparok mejatoto eo ad im ej kōṃṃan bwe mour en maroñ. Mars ear luuji bukwōn magnet eo an 4 bilien iiō remootḷọk, im raar kotake mejatoto eo an ṃōkajḷọk. Magnetosphere an Jupiter ej 20,000 alen kajoorḷọk jān an Laḷ!
marshallese.in_2006_the_international_astronomical: Ilo 2006, International Astronomical Union ear kōmeḷeḷeik jilu men ñan juon planet: (1) Ej doulul Aḷ ✓, (2) Ewōr an eddo ebwe ñan wāween doulul ✓, (3) Ear "karreoiki iaḷ in doulul eo an" jān menin ko jet ✗. Pluto ej jiṃor kōjerbal bukwōn in doulul eo an ippān tọujin menin ko an Kuiper Belt, kōn men in rej ba ej juon "dwarf planet." Men in ejjab kadikḷọk an ekkā — New Horizons ear kwaḷọk bwe ej jerbal wōt!
marshallese.over_billions_of_years_gravitational_t: Ilo bilien iiō, kajoor in ibwijleplep an gravity emaroñ ruṃwijḷọk an juon allōñ ukōt ṃae iien ej jelṃae iien doulul eo an. Jeṃḷọken: juon turin ej jaḷḷọk ñan planet eo iien otemjej. Allōñ eo ad ej lokjak ippān Laḷ. Mercury ej lokjak jimattan ippān Aḷ (3:2). Pluto im Charon rej lokjak ippān doon — rej kwaḷọk turin eo wōt ñan doon iien otemjej!
marshallese.a_biosignature_is_any_evidence_of_past: Juon biosignature ej jabdewōt kaṃool in mour ṃoktata ak kiiō. Ri-jeḷāḷọkjeṇ rej pukot: (1) dān, (2) molecule in organic, (3) gas ilo mejatoto āinwōt oxygen ak methane ko rejjab maroñ pād eḷaññe ejjeḷọk mour ej kōṃṃani, (4) jikin kajoor. Jikin eṃṃan tata ilo solar system eo ad: Mars (dān ṃor), Europa (lọjet iuṃwin kil), Enceladus (baib in dān), im Titan (ḷwe in methane).
marshallese.guided_tour_for_beginners_grades_3_5: Ito-itak eṃōj tōllọke ñan ro rej jino (grade 3-5)
marshallese.smallest_planet_no_atmosphere_to_retai: Planet edik tata; ejjeḷọk mejatoto ñan dāpij māāṇāṇ.
marshallese.hottest_planet_due_to_runaway_greenhou: Planet emāāṇāṇ tata kōn greenhouse effect ejjab bōjrak. Ej doulul jenliklik!
marshallese.only_known_planet_with_liquid_water_an: Planet eo wōt jejeḷā kake ewōr an dān im mour.

marshallese.drag_the_time_slider_to_watch_a_star_e: Kekaake slider in iien bwe kwōn lale juon iju ej eddek jān ḷotak ñan mej. Kāālōt juon eddo — iju ko rej āinjuon ewōr aer mour āinjuon.
marshallese.hydrogen_fusion_in_core: Kōṃṃan helium jān hydrogen ilo lukwōn
marshallese.or_black_hole_if_25_m: Ak juon rọñ emarok eḷaññe > 25 M☉
marshallese.drag_the_slider_to_orbit_the_moon_arou: Kekaake slider bwe Allōñ en doulul Laḷ. Lale wāween eo ej oktak ilo iien lukkuun ekkar ñan angle in Aḷ-Laḷ-Allōñ.
marshallese.drag_the_alignment_slider_to_line_up_s: Kekaake slider in jiṃwe bwe Aḷ, Allōñ, im Laḷ ren jutak ilo juon lain. Ukōt ikōtaan eclipse in aḷ im eclipse in allōñ.
marshallese.adjust_solar_wind_latitude_and_altitud: Ukōt kōto in aḷ, latitude, im utiej bwe kwōn karōk aurora eo. Kōḷōr ej pād ioon menin ta ko rej kōṃṃakūt atom ta ko ilo mejatoto.
marshallese.a_comet_gets_two_tails_when_it_nears_t: Juon comet ewōr ruo ḷokan ñe ej epaake Aḷ. Ukōt tōḷọk + angle in kōto bwe kwōn lo ekōjkan aer waḷọk.
marshallese.curved_pushed_by_photon_radiation_pres: — eip, jiped in photon radiation ej iuuni (ruṃwijḷọk)
marshallese.straight_pushed_by_solar_wind_charged_: — ejiṃwe, menin ewōr charge ilo kōto in aḷ rej iuuni (ṃōkajḷọk)
marshallese.adjust_mass_and_spin_watch_the_event_h: Ukōt eddo im ukōt. Lale event horizon ej eddek im accretion disk ej uwaak. Ukōt eḷap ej jilkinḷọk jet ko ilo jabōn ko.
marshallese.black_hole_has_3_properties_mass_spin_: Rọñ emarok ewōr 3 men: eddo, ukōt, charge. Event horizon ej jikin eo ejjeḷọk rọọl — ñe meram ej eḷḷā jāne, ejjeḷọk men emaroñ ko. Accretion disk ej menin ko rej doulul lowaanḷọk, im eṃōj kaōnḷọki ñan milien degree kōn iiaieo. Rọñ ko reṃōkaj aer ukōt remaroñ jilkinḷọk jet in relativity ilo jikin an ukōt.
marshallese.scrub_earth_years_and_watch_all_five_i: Kekaake iiō in Laḷ im lale ḷalem planet ko lowaan rej doulul ilo ṃōkaj eo aer lukkuun. Kien kein kajilu an Kepler ilo eṃṃakūt.
marshallese.kepler_s_third_law_orbital_period_squa: Kien kein kajilu an Kepler: iien doulul ruoḷọk ∝ tōḷọk jiluḷọk. Planet ko lowaan rej ettōr; ko ālikin rej tōbtōb. Jupiter ej bōk 12 iiō in Laḷ ñan juon doulul; Mercury ej kadedeḷọk juon doulul kajjojo 88 raan.
marshallese.build_a_spacecraft_from_real_component: Kalōk juon wa in mejatoto jān ṃōttan ko relukkuun. Kāālōt lukwōn, kajoor, propulsion + men ko ej bōkḷọk — lale eddo + oṇāān ej oktak.
marshallese.the_sun_has_an_11_year_cycle_of_sunspo: Aḷ ewōr an juon doulul in 11 iiō in jerbal an sunspot. Kekaake bwe kwōn lo sunspot ko rej itok im jako + jilkinḷọk in CME.
marshallese.the_sun_cycles_every_11_years_between_: Aḷ ej doulul kajjojo ~11 iiō ikōtaan edik tata (jejjo sunspot, eaenōṃṃan) im eḷap tata (elōñ sunspot, elōñ solar flare + CME). Doulul 25 ear tōpar eḷaptata ilo enañin 2024-2025 im kiiō ej dikḷọk.
marshallese.where_could_life_as_we_know_it_survive: Ia mour āinwōt jejeḷā kake emaroñ mour ipeḷaakin jabdewōt iju? Ukōt meram in iju + tōḷọk in planet bwe kwōn lo.
marshallese.the_habitable_zone_is_where_surface_wa: Bukwōn in mour ej ijo dān ioon emaroñ pād wōt āinwōt dān. Tōrerein lowaan: greenhouse effect ej kaōnḷọke im kōṃōrāik. Tōrerein ālikin: aij ej dāpij CO2, im ej piọ otem piọ. Tōrerein ko rej ekkar ñan √L.
marshallese.drag_the_moon_closer_to_make_earth_s_t: Kekaake Allōñ epaakeḷọk bwe ibwijleplep an Laḷ en ḷapḷọk. Lale bwe ibbōkḷọk eo ej pād ilo turin ko ruo — epaak im ettoḷọk.
marshallese.earth_moon_tidal_bulge: Ibbōkḷọk in Ibwijleplep an Laḷ + Allōñ
marshallese.tides_happen_because_gravity_pulls_mor: Ibwijleplep ej waḷọk kōnke gravity ej kanooj kekaake turin epaak eḷapḷọk jān turin ettoḷọk an Laḷ. Turin ko ruo rej ibbōkḷọk. Aḷ im Allōñ ippān doon rej kōṃṃan ibwij eḷap (ñe rej jutak ilo juon lain) + ibwij edik (ñe rej jelṃae doon).
marshallese.rotate_earth_and_adjust_season_watch_t: Ukōt Laḷ im ukōt iien in iiō. Lale lain in raan/boñ ej eṃṃakūt + jeplōklōk in jikin doulul ej ukōt jimattan eo aḷ ej meram ie.
marshallese.five_gravitational_sweet_spots_between: Ḷalem jikin eṃṃan an gravity ikōtaan ruo menin ijo wa in mejatoto remaroñ jutak ie. James Webb ej pād ilo L2.
marshallese.green_stable_equilibria_l4_l5_yellow_u: Maroro: eaenōṃṃan (L4, L5) • Iaḷo: ejjab pen ak eṃṃan tokjān (L1, L2, L3)
marshallese.five_points_in_any_two_body_orbit_wher: Ḷalem jikin ilo jabdewōt doulul in ruo menin ijo gravity im kajoor in doulul rej jelṃae doon. Wa in mejatoto remaroñ jutak ijin kōn kaan edik. JWST ej pād ilo L2 — iien otemjej ilikin Laḷ, ettoḷọk jān Aḷ.
marshallese.each_element_fingerprints_light_in_spe: Kajjojo element ej kōṃṃan juon kakōḷḷe ilo meram ilo wavelength ko rekkar. Ukōtukōt element ko bwe kwōn lo ekōjkan ri-alwōj iju rej kile er ilo iju ko rettoḷọk.
marshallese.element_emission_lines_fingerprint: Lain in meram an element (kakōḷḷe eo an)
marshallese.every_element_emits_its_own_unique_pat: Kajjojo element ej jilkinḷọk juon wāween wavelength in meram eo an make — kakōḷḷe eo an spectral. Ñe jej lale meram jān iju ko rettoḷọk, jemaroñ jeḷā ta men ko rej jān e. Eñin wāween ad jeḷā bwe Aḷ ej 75% hydrogen!
marshallese.click_constellations_to_see_their_star: Kalikkar constellation ko bwe kwōn lo iju ko aer + lain ko rej kobaik er. Kajjojo iju ewōr an kōḷōr + etan lukkuun.
marshallese.constellations_are_patterns_of_stars_t: Constellation ko rej wāween in iju ko armej raar kile ilo tọujin iiō. IAU ear kajjiṃwe 88 constellation ilo 1922. Iju ko ilo juon constellation ekkā aer jab epaake doon lukkuun — rej āinwōt epaake wōt jān Laḷ.
marshallese.how_much_delta_v_travel_time_to_reach_: Jete delta-v + iien ito-itak ñan tōpar jikin ko rejjab āinwōt juon? Doulul in Hohmann transfer ko eṃōj kwaḷọki.
marshallese.a_hohmann_transfer_is_the_most_fuel_ef_2: Juon Hohmann transfer ej iaḷ eo edikḷọk kaan ñan eṃṃakūt ikōtaan ruo doulul redoulul. Ej kōjerbal ruo kōkaan: juon ñan deḷọñ ilo ellipse in transfer, juon ñan doululi ilo jikin eo. Δv ej aolepān oktak ilo ṃōkaj eaikuj.
marshallese.mars_rover_pathfinder: 🚗 Ri-kappok Iaḷ ñan Rover in Mars
marshallese.pilot_a_rover_from_start_to_goal_plan_: Kōṃṃakūt juon rover jān jino ñan jeṃḷọk. Karōk iaḷ ipeḷaakin dekā im toḷ; lale kaan eo aṃ!
marshallese.drive_the_rover_from_start_to_goal_cos: Kōṃṃakūt rover eo jān jino ñan jeṃḷọk. Oṇāān: laḷ eṃṃan 1,
marshallese.plan_the_path_to_conserve_fuel_like_re: Karōk iaḷ eo bwe kwōn kōjparok kaan. Āinwōt rover ko relukkuun ioon Mars, kajjojo mita ej aikuj karōk kaan.
marshallese.cosmic_distance_ladder: 📏 Ri-uwe in Tōḷọk in Laḷ In
marshallese.how_astronomers_measure_distance_each_: Ekōjkan ri-alwōj iju rej joñe tōḷọk: kajjojo wāween ej jipañ eo tokālik. Uwe jān joñan Laḷ ñan aolepān laḷ in jemaroñ loe.
marshallese.compared_sun_angle_in_two_cities_first: Ear keidi angle in aḷ ilo ruo jikin kweilọk. Joñe ṃoktata an Laḷ.
marshallese.hipparchus_150_bce_used_earth_s_shadow: Hipparchus (~150 BCE) ear kōjerbal lorak in Laḷ ioon Allōñ ilo eclipse ñan joñe tōḷọk.
marshallese.defines_the_astronomical_unit_modern_r: Ej kōmeḷeḷeik astronomical unit. Radar in raan kein ej jiṃwe ñan mita.
marshallese.kepler_s_third_law_distance_from_orbit: Kien kein kajilu an Kepler: tōḷọk jān iien doulul. Kiiō wa in mejatoto rej kaṃoole.
marshallese.earth_s_orbit_gives_2_au_baseline_star: Doulul an Laḷ ej leḷọk juon baseline in 2 AU. Iju eo ej āinwōt ej eṃṃakūt ilo iien ko.
marshallese.pulsation_period_reveals_true_brightne: Iien in ibbōkḷọk ej kwaḷọk meram eo lukkuun. Keidi ippān meram jemaroñ loe ñan tōḷọk.
marshallese.same_cepheid_method_extended_to_other_: Ejja wāween Cepheid ñan galaxy ko jet. Hubble ear kwaḷọk ilo 1923 bwe Andromeda ear pād ilikin galaxy eo ad.
marshallese.more_distant_galaxies_are_receding_fas: Galaxy ko rettoḷọkḷọk rej ettoḷọkḷọk ṃōkajḷọk. v = H × d ej leḷọk tōḷọk.
marshallese.edge_of_observable_universe: Tōrerein laḷ in ko jemaroñ loi
marshallese.cosmic_microwave_background_is_light_f: Cosmic Microwave Background ej meram jān 13.8 bilien iiō remootḷọk, eṃōj an erḷọk kōn eddek in laḷ in.
marshallese.cosmic_distance_ladder_2: Ri-uwe in Tōḷọk in Laḷ In
marshallese.light_from_receding_objects_redshifts_: Meram jān menin ko rej ettoḷọkḷọk ej būrōrōḷọk; jān ko repaakḷọk, ej bluuḷọk. Eñin wāween ad joñe tōḷọk in laḷ in + jeḷā bwe laḷ in ej eddek.
marshallese.how_much_of_a_planet_s_incoming_sunlig: Jete iaan meram in aḷ ej deḷọñ ioon juon planet ej rọọlḷọk im jete ej deḷọñ? Eñin ej kōṃṃan māāṇāṇ ipeḷaakin.
marshallese.albedo_fraction_of_light_reflected_ice: Albedo = ṃōttan in meram ej rọọlḷọk. Aij + kōdọ rej kanooj rọọlḷọk meram (albedo eḷap); bwidej emarok + dān rej bōk meram (albedo edik). Rọọlḷọk eḷapḷọk = planet eṃōḷoḷọk. Eñin ice-albedo feedback eo ej kōṃṃan iien ko an aij.
marshallese.13_8_billion_years_compressed_into_a_s: 13.8 bilien iiō ilo juon slider. Kekaake jān singularity ñan rainin.
marshallese.spacetime_matter_compressed_to_a_point: Spacetime + menin eṃōj jipede ñan juon tōbtōb
marshallese.universe_expands_by_10_in_a_fraction_o: Laḷ in ear erḷọk 10²⁶ ilo ṃōttan juon second
marshallese.quarks_bind_into_protons_and_neutrons: Quark ko rej kobaik ñan proton im neutron
marshallese.first_atomic_nuclei_hydrogen_helium_li: Lukwōn in atom ṃoktata: hydrogen, helium, lithium
marshallese.first_atoms_cmb_photons_released: Atom ṃoktata; photon in CMB eṃōj kōtḷọki
marshallese.no_stars_mostly_neutral_hydrogen_dark_: Ejjeḷọk iju; eḷaptata hydrogen neutral + dark matter
marshallese.population_iii_stars_massive_short_liv: Iju in Population III: eddo eḷap, mour ekadu
marshallese.mergers_create_the_first_galaxy_seeds: Kobaik ko rej kōṃṃan ine in galaxy ṃoktata
marshallese.most_galaxies_assembled_star_formation: Eḷaptata galaxy eṃōj aer kobaik; kōṃṃan iju ej tōpar eḷaptata
marshallese.our_sun_and_planets_accrete: Aḷ eo ad im planet ko rej kobaik
marshallese.expansion_accelerating_due_to_dark_ene: Eddek ej ṃōkajḷọk kōn dark energy
marshallese.the_universe_is_13_8_billion_years_old: Laḷ in ewōr an 13.8 bilien iiō. Ear jino eddo im māāṇāṇ ejjeḷọk joñan, innām ear erḷọk im ṃōḷoḷọk. Galaxy ko raar waḷọk ilo 1 bilien iiō, Aḷ eo ad ilo 9 bilien iiō, im jej pād ijin ilo 13.8 bilien iiō.
marshallese.click_incoming_asteroids_before_they_r: Kalikkar asteroid ko rej itok ṃokta jān aer tōpar Laḷ. Āinwōt jerbal in DART an NASA ñan likōkḷaḷ planet.
marshallese.real_nasa_program_dart_double_asteroid: Program lukkuun an NASA: DART (Double Asteroid Redirection Test) ear ukōt doulul an Dimorphos ilo 2022. Planetary Defense Coordination Office ej lale 30,000+ menin ko repaak ñan Laḷ.
marshallese.four_galaxy_morphologies_spirals_like_: Emān wāween galaxy. Spiral āinwōt eo ad rej kwaḷọk pā ko rej kōkaḷḷe ijo iju rej waḷọk ie. Elliptical rej ṃor, irregular rej ekūtōtō.
marshallese.bigger_aperture_gathers_more_light_res: Aperture eḷapḷọk ej aini meram eḷapḷọk + kwaḷọk men ko redik. Magnification edikḷọk tokjān jān aṃ ḷōmṇak.
marshallese.aperture_matters_more_than_magnificati: Aperture eḷapḷọk tokjān jān magnification! Objective eḷapḷọk ej aini meram eḷapḷọk + kwaḷọk men ko redik. Magnification eḷapḷọk jān enañin 20x kajjojo cm in aperture ej kōṃṃan wōt bwe en jab alikkar. Mirror eo 6.5 m an JWST ej katak kōn galaxy ko jān bukwi milien iiō ṃoktata ālikin Big Bang.
marshallese.drag_the_altitude_slider_up_through_ea: Kekaake slider in utiej ilōñḷọk ilo mejatoto an Laḷ. Jiped ej wanlaḷḷọk, māāṇāṇ ej oktak, im chemistry ej oktak kajjojo ṃōttan.
marshallese.weather_happens_here_temperature_decre: Mejatoto ej waḷọk ijin. Māāṇāṇ ej wanlaḷḷọk ñe utiej ej ḷapḷọk.
marshallese.ozone_layer_absorbs_uv_temperature_inc: Ṃōttan ozone ej bōk UV. Māāṇāṇ ej ḷapḷọk ñe utiej ej ḷapḷọk.
marshallese.meteors_burn_up_here_coldest_layer_90_: Meteor rej urur ijin. Ṃōttan eo eṃōḷotata (-90°C).
marshallese.iss_orbits_here_400km_aurora_glow_very: ISS ej doulul ijin (400km). Meram in aurora. Mejatoto emeoeo otem meoeo ak emāāṇāṇ.
marshallese.boundary_to_space_air_escapes_to_space: Tōrerein ñan mejatoto. Mejatoto ej ko ñan mejatoto.
marshallese.galileo_s_1610_observations_venus_goes: Alwōj ko an Galileo ilo 1610: Venus ej ilọk ilo wāween ko. Eñin ear kaṃool bwe Venus ej doulul Aḷ, jab Laḷ.
marshallese.galileo_s_1610_discovery_venus_has_pha: Men eo Galileo ear loe ilo 1610: Venus ewōr an wāween āinwōt Allōñ
marshallese.in_1610_galileo_observed_venus_through: Ilo 1610 Galileo ear alwōj Venus kōn telescope eo an im ear lo bwe ej ilọk ilo wāween ko — āinwōt Allōñ. Eñin ear kaṃool bwe Venus ej doulul Aḷ, jab Laḷ. Wāween eo an Ptolemy ej likūt Laḷ ilo lukwōn ejjab maroñ kōmeḷeḷeik juon Venus eobrak. Kaṃool eḷap ñan ḷōmṇak eo an Copernicus bwe Aḷ ej pād ilo lukwōn.
marshallese.a_magnetic_field_deflects_solar_wind_p: Juon bukwōn magnet ej kōjepḷaak kōto in aḷ + kōjparok mejatoto. Mars ear luuji aolep; kōn men in ej jeṃaden.
marshallese.earth_s_magnetic_field_deflects_most_s: Bukwōn magnet an Laḷ ej kōjepḷaak eḷaptata in kōto in aḷ, im ej kōjparok mejatoto + mour. Mars ear luuji bukwōn magnet eo an ~4 bilien iiō remootḷọk im ear ṃōkajḷọk an luuji mejatoto eo an. Jupiter ewōr an bukwōn ekajoortata ilo solar system.
marshallese.switch_between_size_and_distance_views: Ukōt ikōtaan alwōj in joñan im alwōj in tōḷọk. Jemaroñ jab kwaḷọk aerro lukkuun ippān doon — eñin ekōjkan an lukkuun ejjeḷọk kobban mejatoto.
marshallese.true_scales_are_hard_to_show_simultane: Epen kwaḷọk joñan ko relukkuun ippān doon. Eḷaññe Laḷ ej juon pī, Aḷ enaaj kar juon bọọḷ eḷap ilo 200 ne ettoḷọk. Eḷaññe tōḷọk ko rej lukkuun, planet ko rej erom tōbtōb ko jemaroñ jab loi. Eḷaptata pija ko rej kōṃṃan jimattan.
marshallese.lunar_lander_mini_game: 🛬 Kukure Edik in Wanlaḷḷọk ioon Allōñ
marshallese.thrust_to_slow_your_descent_land_softe: Kōjerbal thrust ñan ruṃwijḷọk aṃ wanlaḷḷọk. Wanlaḷḷọk emera jān 2.5 m/s ak kwōnaaj rup. Lale kaan eo — ejjab bwe ñan jutak wōt.
marshallese.apollo_11_nearly_ran_out_of_fuel_durin: Apollo 11 enañin ear maat kaan ilo an wanlaḷḷọk ioon Allōñ. Neil Armstrong ear ukōt autopilot kōn pein ñan pukot juon jikin wanlaḷḷọk emetak. Ear tōpar laḷ ke ~25 second in kaan ear pād wōt.
marshallese.pick_a_destination_see_how_long_light_: Kāālōt juon jikin + lale toon iien meram ej bōk ñan tōpare. Ilikin solar system, tōḷọk ko rej kanooj ḷapḷọk.
marshallese.edge_of_observable_universe_2: Tōrerein laḷ in ko jemaroñ loi
marshallese.light_travel_expansion: Ito-itak an meram + eddek in laḷ in
marshallese.light_moves_300_000_km_s_we_see_distan: Meram ej etal 300,000 km/s. Jej lo menin ko rettoḷọk āinwōt aer kar pād ke meram ear diwōjḷọk jāer. Aḷ eo jej loe ewōr an 8 minit; Proxima Centauri ewōr an 4 iiō. Galaxy in Andromeda ewōr an 2.5 milien iiō.
marshallese.sun_path_across_latitudes: ☀ Iaḷ an Aḷ ilo Latitude ko
marshallese.where_exactly_does_the_sun_rise_set_it: Ia Aḷ ej tak im tulọk ie? Ej pād ioon latitude eo aṃ + raan eo. Mālejjoñ Maine ippān Arctic Circle.
marshallese.sun_path_depends_on_latitude_season_at: Iaḷ an Aḷ ej pād ioon latitude + iien in iiō. Ilo lukwōn, aḷ ej etal jiṃwe ilōñ. Ilo Arctic Circle, aḷ in lukwōn boñ ilo solstice in māāṇāṇ + boñ ilo jabōn ilo solstice in piọ. Portland ilo Maine: ilo lukwōn māāṇāṇ aḷ ej utiej; ilo lukwōn piọ, aḷ enañin jab eḷḷā jān mejatoto.
marshallese.some_moons_may_host_life_europa_encela: Jet allōñ remaroñ ewōr mour ie: Europa + Enceladus + Titan + Ganymede ewōr aer lọjet iuṃwin kil. Jerbal ko rej pukot kiiō.
marshallese.subsurface_ocean_has_2_water_of_earth_: Lọjet eo iuṃwin ewōr an 2× dān jān lọjet ko an Laḷ. Hydrothermal vent remaroñ pād ilo laḷin lọjet. Jerbal in JUICE + Europa Clipper rej etal wōt.
marshallese.cassini_discovered_geysers_spraying_wa: Cassini ear lo baib ko rej jibwe dān + organics + hydrogen + silica. Chemistry in plume ej kwaḷọk menin ko + jikin kajoor ko remaroñ lale mour.
marshallese.thick_atmosphere_of_n2_ch4_lakes_of_li: Mejatoto emijel in N2 + CH4. Ḷwe in methane dān ioon. Lọjet in dān-ammonia iuṃwin. Mour emaroñ ak enaaj lukkuun āinjuon.
marshallese.largest_moon_subsurface_ocean_confirme: Allōñ eḷaptata. Kaṃool ekajoor jān Hubble kōn juon lọjet iuṃwin kil. Jerbal in JUICE enaaj katak kake.
marshallese.oldest_visible_surface_in_solar_system: Ioon eṃortata jemaroñ loe ilo solar system. Emaroñ ewōr lọjet iuṃwin kil. Radiation edikḷọk jān allōñ ko jet an Jupiter.
marshallese.most_volcanically_active_body_in_solar: Menin ewōr toḷ in kijeek eḷaptata ilo solar system. 400+ toḷ in kijeek rej jerbal. Mejatoto in sulfur dioxide. Jemaroñ jab mour ie.
marshallese.what_would_it_take_to_make_mars_liveab: Ta eaikuj bwe Mars en juon jikin mour? Ukōt gas in greenhouse, ōnḷọk in aij, im mar — lale Mars ej oktak.
marshallese.polar_ice_melt: Ōnḷọk in aij ilo jabōn ko
marshallese.terraforming_mars_would_take_thousands: Kōṃṃan bwe Mars en āinwōt Laḷ enaaj bōk tọujin iiō. Jej aikuj: kamijelḷọk mejatoto (gas in greenhouse), kaōnḷọk ioon (ej ōnḷọk aij), bōktok mar (oxygen). Katak ko an NASA rej ba bwe CO2 ilo Mars kiiō emeoeo otem meoeo ñan kōṃṃane ilo ejjeḷọk bōktok eḷap. Eḷaptata ej wōt bwebwenato in science fiction.
marshallese.hubble_stared_at_an_empty_patch_of_sky: Hubble ear alwōj juon jikin ejjeḷọk kobban ilo mejatoto iuṃwin 10 raan im ear lo 3000 galaxy rettoḷọk. Lale epaak — kajjojo tōbtōb ejjab alikkar ej juon galaxy.
marshallese.each_fuzzy_blob_is_a_galaxy_of_100_bil: Kajjojo tōbtōb ejjab alikkar ej juon galaxy ewōr milien ñan bukwi bilien iju
marshallese.in_1995_hubble_pointed_at_a_tiny_dark_: Ilo 1995, Hubble ear jaḷḷọk ñan juon jikin edik emarok ilo mejatoto iuṃwin 10 raan. Jeṃḷọken: 3000 galaxy rettoḷọk ilo juon pija. JWST ear kōṃṃane eṃwilaḷḷọk, im ej katak kōn galaxy jān bukwi milien iiō ṃoktata ālikin Big Bang.
marshallese.hotter_stars_look_bluer_cooler_stars_r: Iju ko remāāṇāṇḷọk rej bluuḷọk; iju ko reṃōḷoḷọk rej būrōrōḷọk. Rej kōkaḷḷe iju ko kōn OBAFGKM ekkar ñan spectral type.
marshallese.red_dwarf_coolest_most_common_stars_75: Red dwarf — iju ko reṃōḷotata + elōñtata (75% in aolep iju)
marshallese.orange_dwarf_quieter_than_sun_longer_l: Orange dwarf — eaenōṃṃanḷọk jān Aḷ, mour eaetokḷọk
marshallese.blue_hottest_rarest_stars_lifespans_on: Bluu — iju ko remāāṇāṇtata + rejakkūtkūt tata, mour eo aer ej milien iiō wōt
marshallese.star_color_temperature_astronomy_mnemo: Kōḷōr in iju = māāṇāṇ. Naan in keememej an ri-alwōj iju ñan OBAFGKM (jān emāāṇāṇtata ñan eṃōḷotata): 'Oh Be A Fine Girl/Guy, Kiss Me.' Iju ko remāāṇāṇḷọk rej eḷapḷọk + meramḷọk + ekadu aer mour.
marshallese.why_does_the_moon_always_show_the_same: Etke Allōñ ej kwaḷọk ejja turin wōt iien otemjej? Kajoor in ibwijleplep ear ruṃwijḷọk an ukōt. Lale ekōjkan tōḷọk + eddo rej jelet iien lokjak.
marshallese.tidal_forces_gradually_slow_a_moon_s_r: Kajoor in ibwijleplep ej ruṃwijḷọk an juon allōñ ukōt ṃae iien ej jelṃae iien doulul eo an. Allōñ eo ad ej lokjak: ejja turin wōt ñan Laḷ iien otemjej. Mercury ej pād ilo resonance 3:2 ippān Aḷ (ejjab lukkuun lokjak).
marshallese.click_each_crater_real_planetary_scien: Kalikkar kajjojo rọñ. Ri-jeḷāḷọkjeṇ in planet rej bwini rọñ ñan jeḷā iiō in ioon — elōñḷọk rọñ = eṃorḷọk.
marshallese.click_craters_to_count_them: 🔍 Kalikkar rọñ ko ñan bwini er
marshallese.crater_counting_is_how_scientists_dete: Bwini rọñ ej wāween an ri-jeḷāḷọkjeṇ jeḷā iiō in ioon in planet. Elōñḷọk rọñ = ioon eṃorḷọk. Toḷ ko an Allōñ elōñ rọñ ie (lukkuun ṃor); maria ej lava ekāālḷọk.
marshallese.mass_curves_spacetime_drag_mass_watch_: Eddo ej kaip spacetime. Kekaake eddo + lale rọñ eo ej ṃwilaḷḷọk. Kōjabwili bọọḷ eo bwe kwōn lo an buñ ilowaan.
marshallese.einstein_s_general_relativity_says_mas: General relativity an Einstein ej ba bwe eddo ej kaip spacetime. Menin ko rejjab eñjake juon kajoor — rej ḷoore geodesic ilo wāween eo eip. Eñin ej gravity. Rọñ ko remarok rej kaip spacetime joñan in bwe kadikḷọk meram ejjab maroñ ko.
marshallese.three_main_asteroid_types_c_s_m_mining: Jilu wāween asteroid: C, S, M. Kamboan ro rej lale wāween M ñan māāl + platinum.
marshallese.most_common_75_dark_primitive_water_ri: Elōñtata (75%). Emarok, ṃor, elōñ dān. Rej pād ilo ṃōttan ālikin.
marshallese.stony_17_lighter_made_of_silicate_mine: Dekā (17%). Emeraḷọk, jān dekā silicate + māāl. Rej pād ilo ṃōttan lowaan.
marshallese.metal_rich_8_mostly_iron_nickel_possib: Elōñ māāl (8%). Eḷaptata māāl + nickel. Bōlen jān lukwōn in protoplanet ko raar rup. Jikin kamboan.
marshallese.light_from_380_000_years_after_the_big: Meram jān 380,000 iiō ālikin Big Bang. Oktak ko redik rej ine in kajjojo galaxy.
marshallese.temperature_fluctuations_of_0_0001_see: Oktak in māāṇāṇ enañin 0.001% — ine in aolep men
marshallese.the_cmb_is_leftover_light_from_380_000: CMB ej meram ear pād wōt jān 380,000 iiō ālikin Big Bang. Oktak ko redik ilo māāṇāṇ rej kwaḷọk ijo menin ko raar eddoḷọk jidik. Jikin ko reddo raar eddek ñan aolep galaxy + iju ko jej loi rainin. Penzias + Wilson raar loe ilo jab kōtmāne ilo 1965 (Nobel Prize 1978).
marshallese.saturn_s_rings_are_99_water_ice_in_tri: Doulul ko an Saturn rej 99% aij in dān ilo trillion ṃōttan. Bōlen rej 100 milien iiō wōt.
marshallese.saturn_s_rings_are_mostly_water_ice_pa: Doulul ko an Saturn eḷaptata rej menin aij in dān jān bok ñan ṃōttan joñan juon eṃ. Rej erḷọk 282,000 km ak mijelier ej < 1 km. Bōlen raar waḷọk jān juon allōñ ear rup ~100 milien iiō remootḷọk — rekāāl!
marshallese.pick_a_core_surface_atmosphere_and_lif: Kāālōt juon lukwōn, ioon, mejatoto, im mour. Lale wāween laḷ eo kwaar kōṃṃane.
marshallese.pulsars_are_spinning_neutron_stars_wit: Pulsar ej iju neutron ej ukōt ewōr an meram in magnet. Laḷ ej lo juon jarom wōt ñe meram eo ej eḷḷā.
marshallese.a_pulsar_is_a_rapidly_rotating_neutron: Juon pulsar ej juon iju neutron ej ukōt ṃōkaj otem ṃōkaj. Jabōn magnet ko an rej jilkinḷọk meram in radiation. Jej lo juon jarom wōt ñe meram eo ej eḷḷā jān kōj — āinwōt juon lighthouse. Jet rej jarom 700 alen ilo juon second. Jocelyn Bell Burnell ear lo eo ṃoktata ilo 1967.
marshallese.stream_of_charged_particles_from_sun_h: Tọọr in menin ewōr charge jān Aḷ, ej deñōt Laḷ. Kōto ekajoorḷọk = elōñḷọk aurora + jorrāān ñan GPS.
marshallese.solar_wind_is_a_stream_of_charged_part: Kōto in aḷ ej juon tọọr in menin ewōr charge (eḷaptata proton + electron) ej tọọrḷọk jān Aḷ iien otemjej. Ṃōkaj ej oktak 250-800 km/s. Jourur ekajoor rej kōṃṃan aurora + remaroñ kọkkure GPS + kein jarom. Iien Carrington 1859: telegraph raar pirūrū im urur.
marshallese.the_iss_orbits_earth_every_90_minutes_: ISS ej doulul Laḷ kajjojo 90 minit. Jet iien ilo meram, jet iien ilo lorak in Laḷ.
marshallese.the_iss_orbits_400_km_up_at_17_500_mph: ISS ej doulul 400 km ilōñ ilo 17,500 mph (28,000 km/h). Ej kadedeḷọk juon doulul kajjojo 90 minit — kōn men in ri-ito-itak in mejatoto rej lo 16 tak in aḷ + tulọk in aḷ ilo juon raan. ISS ej menin eḷaptata armej raar kalōke ilo mejatoto.
marshallese.voyager_1_2_launched_1977_they_are_now: Voyager 1 + 2 raar jino ilo 1977. Kiiō rej pād ilo mejatoto ikōtaan iju; Voyager 1 ear eḷḷā jān heliopause ilo 2012 im Voyager 2 ilo 2018.
marshallese.voyagers_1_2_launched_1977_to_study_ou: Voyager 1 + 2 raar jino 1977 ñan katak kōn planet ko ālikin. Erro raar eḷḷā jān heliopause (tōrerein in kōto in aḷ) ilo 2012 + 2018 — kiiō rej pād ilo mejatoto ikōtaan iju. Kajjojo ej bōkḷọk juon Golden Record ewōr yokwe + al ñan jabdewōt ro rettoḷọk renaaj loi.
marshallese.mercury_passes_in_front_of_the_sun_eve: Mercury ej eḷḷā iṃaan Aḷ kajjojo jet iiō. Lale an eḷḷā — ak kōn juon solar filter ejiṃwe wōt.
marshallese.watch_with_proper_solar_filter_only_ne: Lale kōn solar filter EJIṂWE wōt — JAB alwōj jiṃwe kōn mejaṃ!
marshallese.a_transit_happens_when_mercury_or_venu: Juon ilām ej waḷọk ñe Mercury (ak Venus) ej eḷḷā ikōtaan Laḷ + Aḷ. Ej āinwōt juon tōbtōb emarok edik ioon Aḷ. Ilām an Mercury tokālik: November 13, 2032. Ilām an Venus tokālik: December 2117 — enaaj jab bar waḷọk ṃae 2125.
marshallese.l_on_foucault_1851_proved_earth_rotate: Léon Foucault ilo 1851 ear kaṃool bwe Laḷ ej ukōt kōn juon pendulum eḷap. Jikin an eṃṃakūt ej ukōt ṃōkajḷọk ilo jabōn ko.
marshallese.l_on_foucault_1851_demonstrated_earth_: Léon Foucault ilo 1851 ear kwaḷọk ukōt an Laḷ kōn juon pendulum eḷap. Jikin an eṃṃakūt ej āinwōt ej ukōt kōnke Laḷ ej ukōt iuṃwin. Ilo jabōn ko: 24 awa. Ilo lukwōn: ejjeḷọk. Ilo Maine: ~34 awa.
marshallese.saturn_s_north_pole_has_a_perfect_hexa: Jabōn eañ an Saturn ewōr juon jourur jiljino-kona ejiṃwe 30,000 km depakpakin. Voyager ear loe ilo 1981.
marshallese.saturn_s_hexagonal_pole_storm: Jourur Jiljino-Kona ilo Jabōn an Saturn
marshallese.persistent_feature_30_000_km_wide_5_ea: Juon men ejjab jako 30,000 km depakpakin — eḷapḷọk jān 2x depakpakin Laḷ
marshallese.saturn_has_a_perfect_hexagonal_storm_a: Saturn ewōr juon jourur jiljino-kona ejiṃwe ilo jabōn eañ eo an — Voyager ear pija ṃoktata (1981), Cassini ear kaṃoole. Jiljino-kona eo ej 30,000 km depakpakin im ejjab jako. Etke jiljino-kona? Wāween jet stream ilo mejatoto + Rossby wave.
marshallese.the_original_clock_as_the_sun_arcs_acr: Awa eo ṃoktata. Ke Aḷ ej eḷḷā ilo mejatoto, gnomon ej jolọk juon lorak ej ukōt im kōkaḷḷe awa ko.
marshallese.sundials_predate_clocks_by_millennia_a: Awa in aḷ raar pād ṃokta jān awa in māāl kōn tọujin iiō. Ke Aḷ ej eṃṃakūt ilo mejatoto, lorak in gnomon ej ukōt. Ri-Ijipt ṃoktata, ri-Grik, ri-Rom, im ri-Jeina raar aolep kalōk awa in aḷ rejiṃwe. Ko rekāāl rej aikuj kajiṃwe daylight saving time + equation of time.
marshallese.80_galaxies_span_10_million_light_year: 80 galaxy rej erḷọk 10 milien iiō in meram ipeḷaakid. Milky Way + Andromeda remaroñ iioon doon ilo enañin 4-5 bilien iiō — katak ko ilo 2025 rej ba enañin 50/50.
marshallese.2_5_mly_away_heading_toward_us: 2.5 Mly ettoḷọk — ej itok ñan kōj!
marshallese.local_group_80_galaxies_in_10_million_: Local Group — ~80 galaxy ilo 10 milien iiō in meram
marshallese.our_local_group_has_80_galaxies_domina: Local Group eo ad ewōr ~80 galaxy im Milky Way + Andromeda rej eḷaptata. Andromeda ej itok epaak ilo 110 km/s — juon iioon emaroñ waḷọk ilo enañin 4-5 bilien iiō. Eḷaññe ej waḷọk: galaxy eḷap Milkomeda.
marshallese.what_size_asteroid_kills_which_level_o: Joñan asteroid ta ej ṃan wāween mour ta? Keidi jān juon dekā edik ñan eo ear ṃan dinosaur.
marshallese.atmospheric_entry_destroys_most_rocks_: Deḷọñ ilo mejatoto ej kọkkure eḷaptata in dekā ko < 5m. Chelyabinsk 2013 (20m) ear rupe wūntō ko ak ejjeḷọk rọñ. Tunguska 1908 (50m) ear kōttāik 2000km² in wōjke. Chicxulub 66Ma (10km) ear ṃan dinosaur ko.
marshallese.a_cme_blasts_billions_of_tons_of_plasm: Juon CME ej jibwe bilien ton in plasma jān Aḷ. Raan ko tokālik, emaroñ kōṃṃan aurora reaiboojoj + jorrāān ñan GPS.
marshallese.a_coronal_mass_ejection_blasts_billion: Juon Coronal Mass Ejection ej jibwe bilien ton in plasma ñan mejatoto ilo 1-2 milien mph. Ej bōk 1-5 raan ñan tōpar Laḷ. CME ko rekajoor rej kōṃṃan jourur in geomagnetic, aurora remeram, im remaroñ kọkkure dayax-gacmeed + kein jarom.
marshallese.cepheids_pulse_on_a_regular_cycle_thei: Cepheid rej ibbōkḷọk ilo juon doulul ejjab oktak. Iien eo aer ej kwaḷọk meram eo aer lukkuun — juon kein joñe an laḷ in.
marshallese.cepheid_variables_pulse_on_a_regular_c: Cepheid variable rej ibbōkḷọk ilo juon doulul ejjab oktak. Iien eo aer ej lukkuun ekkar ñan meram eo aer lukkuun (Henrietta Leavitt 1908). Ri-alwōj iju rej joñe iien eo + kōjerbale ñan jeḷā meram lukkuun + tōḷọk.
marshallese.orbits_range_from_circles_to_long_elli: Doulul ko rej jān doulul ñan ellipse ko reaetok. Ukōt eccentricity ñan jeje iaḷ āinwōt planet ak āinwōt comet.
marshallese.orbital_eccentricity_goes_from_0_perfe: Eccentricity in doulul ej jān 0 (doulul ejiṃwe) ñan 1 (ko in parabolic). Planet ko enañin doulul. Comet rej lukkuun āinwōt lep — rej etal epaake Aḷ + ettoḷọk ilo ṃōttan ālikin. Doulul in hyperbolic (e>1) ej meḷeḷein juon ilām juon alen wōt ilo solar system.
marshallese.earth_s_atmosphere_blocks_most_wavelen: Mejatoto an Laḷ ej bōbrae elōñ wavelength. Meram jemaroñ loe, radio, im jet wūntō in infrared rej tōpar laḷ.
marshallese.visible_light_radio_waves_penetrate_th: ✔ Meram jemaroñ loe, radio wave, im jet infrared rej tōpar laḷ
marshallese.earth_atmosphere_blocks_most_wavelengt: Mejatoto an Laḷ ej bōbrae elōñ wavelength. Meram jemaroñ loe, radio, im jet wūntō in infrared rej tōpar laḷ; UV, X-ray, gamma-ray, im elōñ infrared rej aikuj jikin alwōj ilo mejatoto āinwōt Hubble, JWST, Chandra, im Fermi.
marshallese.spectra_reveal_temperature_composition_m: Spectra rej kwaḷọk māāṇāṇ, kobban, eṃṃakūt, im kakōḷḷe kōn jekjek in eddek an juon menin.
marshallese.cool_giant_atmosphere_4000_k: Mejatoto an iju eḷap eṃōḷo: enañin 4,000 K
marshallese.excited_gas_10000_k: Gas eṃōj kōṃṃakūte: ekkā enañin 10,000 K
marshallese.expanding_ejecta_thousands_km_s: Menin ko rej erḷọk: tọujin km/s
marshallese.spectral_line_strength_caution: Kajoor in lain ejjab juon kein joñe pidodo in joñan: māāṇāṇ, eddo, im ionization barāinwōt rej kōṃṃan ta men ko rej alikkartata. Lain kein rej joñak in katak eṃōj kapidodoiki.
marshallese.spectra_life_paths_note: Waanjoñak kein rejjab juon iaḷ in iien: juon iju āinwōt Aḷ emaroñ erom juon iju būrōrō eḷap im juon planetary nebula, ak juon supernova Wāween II ej kajeṃḷọk mour an juon iju eddo.
marshallese.earth_rotates_15_per_hour_watch_when_i: Laḷ ej ukōt 15° kajjojo awa. Lale ñāāt raelep ilo Tokyo, ñāāt tak in aḷ ej tōpar Portland.
marshallese.earth_rotates_15_per_hour_utc_coordina: Laḷ ej ukōt 15° kajjojo awa. UTC (Coordinated Universal Time) ej kein joñe an aolepān laḷ. Time zone ko rej oktak kōn ±awa. Portland Maine ej UTC-5 (EST) ak UTC-4 (EDT). Ipeḷaakin laḷ, jimattan in Laḷ ej meram im jimattan ej boñ.
marshallese.click_through_12_astronomy_facts_that_: Kalikkar 12 men in alwōj iju ko rejjab āinwōt aṃ ḷōmṇak.
marshallese.textbook_diagrams_lie_the_moon_is_much: Pija ko ilo bok in katak rej riab. Allōñ ettoḷọkḷọk jān āinwōt aer jeje. Lale joñan eo lukkuun.
marshallese.moon_too_big_close: Allōñ (eḷap otem ḷap + epaak otem paak)
marshallese.most_textbooks_draw_the_moon_too_big_t: Eḷaptata bok in katak rej jeje Allōñ eḷapḷọk + epaakḷọk. Ṃool: depakpakin Allōñ ej 1/4 in an Laḷ, im tōḷọk ñan Allōñ ej ~30 depakpakin Laḷ. Meram ej bōk 1.3 second ñan ito-itak.
marshallese.jupiter_has_the_shortest_day_10_hr_ven: Jupiter ewōr an raan ekadutata (10 awa). Venus ewōr an eaetoktata (243 raan in Laḷ!).
marshallese.day_length_across_the_solar_system_log: Aetokin raan ilo Solar System (joñan log)
marshallese.jupiter_spins_fast_venus_rotates_slowe: Jupiter ej ukōt ṃōkaj. Venus ej ukōt ruṃwijḷọk jān iiō eo an.
marshallese.gas_giants_spin_fast_because_of_how_th: Gas giant rej ukōt ṃōkaj kōn wāween aer waḷọk. Venus ej ukōt ruṃwijtata, bōlen kōn ibwijleplep an aḷ + kekaake an mejatoto emijel. Laḷ ej ruṃwijḷọk kōn ~1.7 milliseconds kajjojo bukwi iiō kōn gravity an Allōñ.
marshallese.total_eclipses_cover_narrow_strips_the: Eclipse ko reobrak rej kalibubu iaḷ ko rekōbwebwe. Iaḷ in eclipse eo ilo 2024 ear eḷḷā ilo eañ in Maine.
marshallese.april_8_2024_total_solar_eclipse_path: Iaḷ in Eclipse in Aḷ Eobrak ilo April 8, 2024
marshallese.total_solar_eclipses_only_happen_along: Eclipse in aḷ eobrak rej waḷọk wōt ilo iaḷ ko rekōbwebwe ~100-150 km depakpakin. Eclipse eo April 8, 2024 ear eḷḷā ilo eañ in Maine — elōñ ri-Maine raar ito-itak ñan eañ ñan lo eobrak. Eclipse eobrak tokālik jemaroñ loe jān Maine: May 1, 2079.
marshallese.sagan_s_cosmic_calendar_13_8_billion_y: Calendar in Laḷ In an Sagan: 13.8 bilien iiō ilo juon iiō. Armej rej itok ilo second eo āliktata.
marshallese.carl_sagan_s_cosmic_calendar_compresse: Calendar in Laḷ In an Carl Sagan: ej kadikḷọk 13.8 bilien iiō ñan 1 iiō. Big Bang = Jan 1. Kiiō = Dec 31 lukwōn boñ. Armej raar waḷọk ilo second ko āliktata. Jikin kweilọk ko rej pād ilo ṃōttan āliktata in juon second.
marshallese.how_many_alien_civilizations_adjust_ea: Jete jukjuk in pād jān bar juon laḷ? Ukōt kajjojo men jejjab jeḷā + lale uwaak eo.
marshallese.in_our_milky_way_galaxy_at_any_time: ilo Galaxy eo ad Milky Way ilo jabdewōt iien
marshallese.ne_habitable_per_system: ne: Oran jemaroñ mour ie kajjojo system
marshallese.frank_drake_1961_estimating_other_civi: Frank Drake 1961: joñe jukjuk in pād ko jet. Eḷaptata men ko jejjab jeḷā — uwaak ko jān <1 (jej make) ñan milien. Ej kwaḷọk ta ko jejjab jeḷā eḷapḷọk jān an leḷọk juon uwaak. Ukōt slider ko bwe kwōn lo ekōjkan an jeṃḷọken oktak ṃōkaj.
marshallese.world_telescopes_catalog: 🔭 Bok in Telescope ko an Laḷ In
marshallese.dozen_biggest_best_telescopes_hubble_j: Joñoul ruo telescope ko reḷaptata + reṃṃantata: Hubble, JWST, Keck, VLT, ALMA, im ta ko rej alwōji.
marshallese.optical_uv_ir_space_telescope_30_year_: Telescope in mejatoto Optical/UV/IR. 30+ iiō in jerbal.
marshallese.infrared_space_telescope_at_l2_lagrang: Telescope in mejatoto infrared. Ilo Lagrange point L2.
marshallese.twin_10m_telescopes_on_mauna_kea_hawai: Ruo telescope 10m ioon Mauna Kea, Hawaii.
marshallese.66_antenna_radio_array_chilean_desert: Juon jikin radio ewōr 66 antenna, ilo jeṃaden in Chile.
marshallese.optical_uv_ir_space_telescope_still_op: Telescope in mejatoto Optical/UV/IR. Ej jerbal wōt.
marshallese.nasa_x_ray_space_telescope: Telescope in mejatoto X-ray an NASA.
marshallese.infrared_space_telescope_retired_2020: Telescope in mejatoto infrared, ear bōjrak 2020.
marshallese.japanese_8_2m_on_mauna_kea: Eo an Japan 8.2m ioon Mauna Kea.
marshallese.future_radio_telescope_australia_s_afr: Telescope in radio tokālik, Australia + South Africa.
marshallese.coming_39m_eso_telescope_chile: Telescope 39m an ESO ej itok. Chile.
marshallese.a_dozen_of_the_world_s_most_powerful_t: Joñoul ruo telescope ko rekajoortata ilo laḷ in. Aperture (cm) ej depakpakin mirror eo eḷap. Aperture eḷapḷọk = meram eḷapḷọk + men ko redik realikkarḷọk. Telescope in mejatoto rej bōbrae jorrāān jān mejatoto.
marshallese.star_lifespan_calculator: ⏳ Kein Bwini Aetokin Mour an Iju
marshallese.massive_stars_live_fast_die_young_adju: Iju ko reddo rej mour ṃōkaj + mej ṃōkaj. Ukōt eddo + lale toon an iju eo urur.
marshallese.massive_stars_burn_fuel_fast_lifespan_: Iju ko reddo rej urur kaan ṃōkaj. Aetokin mour ∝ M^-2.5. Aḷ: 10 Gyr (jej pād ilo lukwōn). 10 M☉: 30 Myr wōt. Red dwarf 0.1 M☉: trillion iiō.
marshallese.your_cosmic_journey: 🎯 Ito-itak eo Aṃ ilo Laḷ In
marshallese.track_your_progress_planets_explored_p: Lale wāween aṃ etal: planet ko kwaar etale, nōṃba ko kwaar bōki, jerbal ko kwaar jeje.
marshallese.this_tool_features_35_interactive_mini: Kein jerbal in ewōr 35+ kein jerbal redik ko rej kwaḷọk alwōj iju, physics, im etale. Jān kōṃṃan rọñ emarok ñan kāke wa in wanlaḷḷọk ioon Allōñ, kwōj maroñ etale Solar System im ta ko ilikin.
marshallese.16_milestones_from_ancient_greek_astro: 16 men ko reḷap jān alwōj iju an ri-Grik ṃor ñan JWST. Etan ko kwōj aikuj jeḷā.
marshallese.a_2300_year_journey_from_aristarchus_t: Juon ito-itak in 2300 iiō jān Aristarchus ñan JWST. Kajjojo men eṃōj loe ear kalōk ioon eo ṃokta. Science ej juon iāekwōj in relay — kajjojo ri-alwōj iju ej jutak ioon aeran ro ṃokta jān e.
marshallese.compare_spectral_classes_temperature_fin: Keidi class in māāṇāṇ in ioon im kakōḷḷe in spectral ko rej kōmeḷeḷeik er.
marshallese.spectral_class_size_caution: Joñan doulul ko rej ejja wōt kōn ad kōṇaan. Spectral class ej kōmeḷeḷeik māāṇāṇ im wāween lain ko, jab depakpakin ak meram make; luminosity class V ej main sequence, III ej giant, im I ej supergiant.
marshallese.m_class_dwarf_supergiant_note: Ejja leta wōt emaroñ kwaḷọk iju ko relukkuun āinjuon: Proxima Centauri ej juon M dwarf, ak Betelgeuse ej juon M supergiant. Aḷ ej G2 V.
marshallese.mars_has_100_thinner_air_made_of_mostl: Mars ewōr an mejatoto 100× emeoeoḷọk im eḷaptata CO₂. Keidi kobban gas + jiped.
marshallese.mars_atmosphere_is_100_thinner_than_ea: Mejatoto in Mars ej 100× emeoeoḷọk jān an Laḷ. Kobban: 95% CO₂. Ñan menono ioon Mars kwōj aikuj oxygen + jiped 100× eḷapḷọk. Enañin ejjeḷọk nitrogen ñan kōṃṃan bwe men ko ren eddek.
marshallese.10_essential_black_hole_terms_event_ho: 10 naan reḷap kōn rọñ emarok: event horizon, singularity, spaghettification, Hawking radiation.
marshallese.event_horizon_telescope_captured_first: Event Horizon Telescope ear bōk pija ṃoktata in rọñ emarok M87* (2019) + Sgr A* (2022). Doulul oranj eo = meram eṃōj kaipe ipeḷaakin juon bọọḷ emarok ijo meram ejjab maroñ ko.
marshallese.five_planets_have_auroras_earth_s_is_g: Ḷalem planet ewōr aer aurora. An Laḷ ej maroro/būrōrō, an Jupiter ekajoortata, an Mars ejeplōklōk.
marshallese.green_oxygen_red_atomic_o_blue_nitroge: Maroro (oxygen) + būrōrō (atomic O) + bluu (nitrogen). Eṃṃantata loe epaake jabōn magnet ko.
marshallese.most_powerful_in_solar_system_driven_b: Ekajoortata ilo solar system. Toḷ in kijeek an Io + bukwōn magnet an Jupiter rej kōṃṃane. Aurora UV ejjab jako.
marshallese.powered_by_solar_wind_less_colorful_th: Kōto in aḷ ej kōṃṃane. Edikḷọk kōḷōr jān an Laḷ ak eḷap. Ej pād raan ko.
marshallese.strange_orientation_due_to_98_axial_ti: Wāween ekabwilōñlōñ kōn jeplōklōk in 98°. Epen bōk pija.
marshallese.weak_no_global_magnetic_field_auroras_: Emera — ejjeḷọk bukwōn magnet ipeḷaakin. Aurora rej pād ipeḷaakin magnet ko rej pād wōt ilo kil.
marshallese.10_missions_that_defined_planetary_exp: 10 jerbal ko raar kōmeḷeḷeik etale planet. Jān Apollo ñan Cassini ñan JWST.
marshallese.first_humans_walk_on_moon: Armej ṃoktata raar etetal ioon Allōñ
marshallese.first_mars_landers_life_experiments: Wa in wanlaḷḷọk ṃoktata ioon Mars + mālejjoñ in mour
marshallese.nuclear_powered_rover_still_active: Rover kōn kajoor in nuclear, ej jerbal wōt
marshallese.first_close_up_of_pluto_arrokoth: Pija epaak ṃoktata in Pluto + Arrokoth
marshallese.replaced_hubble_for_infrared_deep_fiel: Ej kobaik ippān Hubble kōn deep field in infrared
marshallese.brightness_counts_backward_smaller_bri: Rej bwini meram jenliklik: edikḷọk = meramḷọk. Joñan jemaroñ loe ej 60 magnitude.
marshallese.magnitudes_count_backward_smaller_brig: Rej bwini magnitude JENLIKLIK: edikḷọk = meramḷọk. Kajjojo jekjek in 5 = 100× meramḷọk. Hipparchus ear kōṃṃane ilo 130 BCE. Aḷ: -26.7. JWST ej lo ñan mag 34. Joñan: 100^((34-(-26))/5) ≈ 10^24 alen emeoeoḷọk jān Aḷ.
marshallese.four_ways_astronomers_describe_positio: Emān wāween ri-alwōj iju rej kōmeḷeḷeik jikin ilo mejatoto.
marshallese.star_fixed_coordinates_right_ascension: Coordinate ekkar ñan iju. Right ascension (h:m:s) + Declination (°). Rej kōjerbale ilo bok in iju.
marshallese.observer_centered_altitude_above_horiz: Ekkar ñan ri-alwōj. Altitude (ilōñin mejatoto) + Azimuth (jān eañ). Rej kōjerbale ñan jaḷḷọk telescope.
marshallese.centered_on_sun_earth_plane_used_for_s: Ekkar ñan jikin Aḷ-Laḷ. Rej kōjerbale ñan menin ko ilo solar system.
marshallese.centered_on_milky_way_plane_used_for_g: Ekkar ñan jikin Milky Way. Rej kōjerbale ñan katak kōn galaxy.
marshallese.astronomers_use_multiple_coordinate_sy: Ri-alwōj iju rej kōjerbal elōñ system in coordinate. Equatorial ej ñan aolep im menin ko rej dāpij ejja coordinate wōt ñe Laḷ ej ukōt. Alt-Az ej oktak iien otemjej ñe Laḷ ej ukōt. Galactic eṃṃantata ñan katak kōn wāween Milky Way.
marshallese.big_numbers_in_astronomy: 🔢 Nōṃba Ko Reḷap ilo Alwōj Iju
marshallese.from_1_sun_to_10_22_stars_the_scale_of: Jān 1 Aḷ ñan 10^22 iju. Joñan laḷ in ekabwilōñlōñ.
marshallese.astronomy_operates_on_absurd_scales_ho: Alwōj iju ej jerbal ilo joñan ko rekabwilōñlōñ. "Jete iju?" — elōñḷọk jān bok ilo aolep parijet ioon Laḷ. "Jete iiō?" — 13.8 bilien iiō. Ak jet nōṃba (jako an rọñ emarok) reḷapḷọk wōt.
marshallese.36_500_objects_orbit_earth_at_various_: 36,500 menin rej doulul Laḷ ilo utiej ko rejjab āinwōt juon. Eṃṃakūt slider in utiej bwe kwōn lo ta ko rej pād ie.
marshallese.36_500_tracked_objects_millions_of_fra: 36,500 menin eṃōj lale + milien ṃōttan rej doulul Laḷ. Uwōta in Kessler Syndrome: elōñ iioon ko rej ḷoore doon im kōṃṃan bwe mejatoto en jab jerbal. SpaceX Starlink ewōr an 5000+ dayax-gacmeed; ej karōk elōñḷọk.
marshallese.every_culture_sees_stories_in_the_star: Kajjojo jukjuk in pād ej lo bwebwenato ilo iju ko. Jān ri-kajoor an Grik ñan Emu ilo Mejatoto an Aboriginal.
marshallese.stories_projected_onto_stars_by_cultur: Bwebwenato ko armej ilo aolep laḷ raar likūti ioon iju ko. Emu ilo Mejatoto an Aboriginal Australia ej kōjerbal kōdọ in bwidej emarok. Ri-jerakrōk in Polynesia rej kōjerbal iju ñan jerakrōk ilo Pacific kōn aer keememej. Alwōj iju barāinwōt ej bwebwenato.
marshallese.5_ways_astronomers_find_planets_around: 5 wāween ri-alwōj iju rej lo planet ipeḷaakin iju ko jet. Transit + Doppler reḷaptata.
marshallese.watch_a_star_and_look_for_tiny_brightn: Alwōj juon iju im pukot ñe meram eo an ej dikḷọk jidik ñe juon planet ej eḷḷā iṃaan. Kepler + TESS raar kōjerbale.
marshallese.a_planet_s_gravity_makes_its_star_wobb: Gravity in juon planet ej kōṃṃan bwe iju eo an en ṃakūtkūt. Jej lo ṃakūtkūt eo āinwōt Doppler shift ilo meram in iju.
marshallese.gravity_of_a_passing_star_planet_bends: Gravity in juon iju+planet ej eḷḷā ej kaip meram jān juon iju ettoḷọkḷọk. Ejjab pād ioon tōḷọk.
marshallese.block_out_the_star_s_light_photograph_: Bōbrae meram in iju eo + bōk pija in planet ko repaak. Ej jerbal wōt ñan planet ko reḷap/rettoḷọk ñan kiiō.
marshallese.variations_in_pulsar_pulses_reveal_orb: Oktak ilo jarom in pulsar rej kwaḷọk menin ko rej doulul. Exoplanet ṃoktata raar loi ilo wāween in (1992).
marshallese.first_exoplanet_around_a_sun_like_star: Exoplanet ṃoktata ipeḷaakin juon iju āinwōt Aḷ: 51 Pegasi b (1995). Kiiō 6,300+ eṃōj kaṃoole. JWST ej kōṃṃan spectroscopy in mejatoto ioon exoplanet — ej pukot biosignature.
marshallese.schedule_of_eclipses_2024_2079_maine_s: Iien in eclipse 2024-2079. Eclipse in aḷ eobrak tokālik ilo Maine: 2079.
marshallese.total_solar_eclipses_are_rare_about_2_: Eclipse in aḷ eobrak rejakkūtkūt. Enañin juon kajjojo 18 allōñ ijoko jet ioon Laḷ, ak kajjojo jemaroñ loe wōt jān juon iaḷ ekōbwebwe. Eclipse in allōñ jemaroñ loi ilo aolepān turin boñ.
marshallese.hubble_s_classification_spirals_ellipt: Kōkaḷḷe an Hubble: spiral, elliptical, irregular + aolep men ikōtaan.
marshallese.bar_through_center: Juon bar ej eḷḷā ilo lukwōn
marshallese.edwin_hubble_classified_galaxies_in_19: Edwin Hubble ear kōkaḷḷe galaxy ko ilo 1936 — "Hubble tuning fork." Spiral + elliptical + irregular. Galaxy rej eddek kōn kobaik — Milky Way ej pād ilo lukwōn mour eo an; juon kobaik ippān Andromeda emaroñ itok ilo bilien iiō (katak ko ilo 2025 rej ba enañin 50/50).
marshallese.cosmic_speeds_chart: ⚡ Chart in Ṃōkaj ilo Laḷ In
marshallese.from_walking_to_light_speed_log_scale_: Jān etetal ñan ṃōkaj in meram (joñan log). Voyager 1 ej menin eo armej raar kōṃṃane ettoḷọktata im juon iaan probe ko ad reṃōkajtata rej diwōjḷọk, ak ej ruṃwij wōt ñe jej keidi ippān laḷ in.
marshallese.voyager_1_is_the_fastest_object_humans: Voyager 1 ej ṃōkaj ekkar ñan wa in mejatoto im kiiō ej menin eo armej raar kōṃṃane ettoḷọktata, ak enaaj bōk enañin 80,000 iiō ñan tōpar iju eo epaaktata. Meram ej kadedeḷọk ejja ito-itak eo ilo 4 iiō.
marshallese.watch_stars_form_from_cold_dust_to_hot: Lale iju rej waḷọk jān bwidej eṃōḷo ñan aḷ ko remāāṇāṇ. 6 jekjek ilo jet milien iiō.
marshallese.stars_are_born_in_clusters_from_giant_: Rej ḷotak iju ilo bwij jān kōdọ in molecular reḷap. Aolepān jerbal: jet milien iiō. Waanjoñak rebuñbuñ: Orion Nebula (M42), Eagle Nebula (Pillars of Creation), Tarantula Nebula.
marshallese.big_cosmic_questions: ❓ Kajjitōk ko Reḷap kōn Laḷ In
marshallese.10_of_the_deepest_open_questions_in_co: 10 iaan kajjitōk ko reṃwilaḷtata rej pād wōt ilo cosmology. Jet ewōr aer uwaak jimattan; jet rej lukkuun ettino.
marshallese.quick_table_of_planet_properties_diame: Juon tebōḷ eṃōkaj kōn men ko an planet. Depakpakin, gravity, aetokin raan, allōñ.
marshallese.side_by_side_comparison_of_key_planet_: Keidi turin ñan turin kōn men ko reḷap an planet. Laḷ = kein joñe. Aḷ ej enañin 109x depakpakin Laḷ (eḷapḷọk jān juon milien alen kobban). Jupiter ewōr 115 allōñ jejeḷā kake. Venus ej ukōt ruṃwij joñan in bwe raan eo an eaetokḷọk jān iiō eo an.
marshallese.40_visual_interactive_mini_tools_made_: 40+ kein jerbal redik ñan alwōj + kōjerbal. Eṃōj kōṃṃane ñan ri-katak im ritto ro rekaitoklimo.
marshallese.40_interactive_mini_tools_svg_visualiz: 40+ kein jerbal redik ñan kōjerbal, pija in SVG, im simulation in katak.
marshallese.from_a_moon_phase_dial_to_a_black_hole: Jān juon dial in wāween allōñ ñan juon ri-kwaḷọk rọñ emarok ñan juon Foucault pendulum, kajjojo kein jerbal eṃōj kalōke bwe ḷōmṇak ko rettino ren alikkar + jemaroñ kukure kaki.
marshallese.built_for_k_12_curious_adults_open_all: Eṃōj kalōke ñan K-12 + ritto ro rekaitoklimo. Kōpeḷḷọk aolep kein jerbal, ak juon wōt — kajjojo ej jerbal make.
marshallese.part_of_alloflow_stem_lab_built_in_mai: Ṃōttan AlloFlow STEM Lab. Eṃōj kalōke ilo Maine, USA. Aolep data jān NASA, ESA, JAXA, USGS, IAU + jikin science ko an aolep. Kōjerbal ñan katak ejjeḷọk oṇāān.
marshallese.9_annual_meteor_showers_their_best_vie: 9 wōt in meteor ilo kajjojo iiō + raan ko reṃṃantata ñan alwōj. Kakōḷḷe calendar eo aṃ.
marshallese.meteor_showers_happen_when_earth_cross: Wōt in meteor rej waḷọk ñe Laḷ ej eḷḷā ilo kwōpej an juon comet. Alwōj eṃṃantata: jikin emarok, ejjeḷọk Allōñ, ālikin lukwōn boñ. Perseids + Geminids rej wōt ko reṃṃantata ilo kajjojo iiō.
marshallese.famous_astronomy_quotes: 💬 Naan ko Rebuñbuñ kōn Alwōj Iju
marshallese.10_quotes_from_astronomers_space_trave: 10 naan jān ri-alwōj iju + ri-ito-itak in mejatoto ko rej kwaḷọk bwilōñ.
marshallese.10_things_you_can_spot_tonight_with_ju: 10 men kwōj maroñ loi buñūnin kōn mejaṃ wōt ak binocular.
marshallese.best_naked_eye_observing_dark_site_awa: Alwōj eṃṃantata kōn mejed: jikin emarok (ettoḷọk jān meram in jikin kweilọk), Allōñ iuṃwin mejatoto, mejed eṃōj aer minene (20-30 minit ilo marok). App ko ejjeḷọk oṇāer: Stellarium, SkyView, Star Walk rej jipañ kile ta ko kwōj loi.
marshallese.carl_sagan_s_most_quoted_reflection_a_: Ḷōmṇak eo eḷaptata aer eọroñ jān Carl Sagan. Juon pixel ewōr aolep ro jaar jeḷā kake.
marshallese.from_this_distant_vantage_point_the_ea: "Jān jikin in ettoḷọk, Laḷ emaroñ jab āinwōt juon men eaorōk. Ak ñan kōj, ej āinjuon. Bar ḷōmṇak kōn tōbtōb eo. Eñin ijin. Eñin ṃweo iṃōd. Eñin kōj. Ioon aolep ro kwōj yokwe er, aolep ro kwōj jeḷā kajjier, aolep ro kwaar roñ kajjier, aolep armej raar mour, raar mour aer mour ie."
marshallese.voyager_1_took_this_photo_of_earth_fro: Voyager 1 ear bōk pija in an Laḷ jān 6 bilien km ettoḷọk ilo Feb 14, 1990 — juon kajjitōk jān Carl Sagan. Laḷ ej juon pixel wōt. Aolep armej ilo bwebwenato raar mour ioon pixel eo.
marshallese.8_iconic_deep_sky_objects_star_nurseri: 8 menin ko rebuñbuñ ilo mejatoto eṃwilaḷ. Jikin ḷotak an iju, kil in iju ko rej mej, ṃōttan supernova.
marshallese.stellar_nursery_24_ly_across_visible_n: Jikin ḷotak an iju 24 ly depakpakin. Jemaroñ loe kōn mejed ilo Jāje an Orion.
marshallese.remains_of_supernova_witnessed_in_1054: Ṃōttan supernova eo raar loe ilo 1054 CE. Ewōr an pulsar.
marshallese.planetary_nebula_in_lyra_glowing_shell: Planetary nebula ilo Lyra. Kil emeram jān juon iju āinwōt Aḷ ej mej.
marshallese.home_of_pillars_of_creation_hubble_199: Ṃweo iṃōn Pillars of Creation (Hubble 1995). Joor in kōṃṃan iju.
marshallese.complex_planetary_nebula_many_shell_la: Planetary nebula epen. Elōñ ṃōttan kil jān ibbōkḷọk ko.
marshallese.closest_planetary_nebula_looks_like_an: Planetary nebula epaaktata. Ej āinwōt juon mej ilo mejatoto.
marshallese.in_large_magellanic_cloud_largest_know: Ilo Large Magellanic Cloud. Jikin kōṃṃan iju eḷaptata jejeḷā kake.
marshallese.supernova_remnant_8000_years_old_massi: Ṃōttan supernova ~8000 iiō. Jekjek ko reḷap ilo Cygnus.
marshallese.astronomy_toolkit_guide: 🛠 Ri-tōl kōn Kein Jerbal in Alwōj Iju
marshallese.what_you_need_to_start_observing_from_: Ta ko kwōj aikuj ñan jino alwōj — jān app ejjeḷọk oṇāān ñan telescope ko rekkar ñan jabdewōt oṇāān.
marshallese.free_planetarium_software_shows_night_: Software in planetarium ejjeḷọk oṇāān. Ej kwaḷọk mejatoto in boñ jān jabdewōt jikin, jabdewōt iien.
marshallese.phone_app_point_at_sky_to_identify_wha: App in phone. Jaḷḷọke ñan mejatoto ñan kile ta eo kwōj alwōje.
marshallese.interactive_3d_solar_system_jwst_missi: Solar system 3D ñan kōjerbal + JWST + pija in jerbal ko.
marshallese.best_starter_scope_reveals_galilean_mo: Kein alwōj eṃṃantata ñan jino. Ej kwaḷọk allōñ ko an Jupiter, Andromeda, bwij in Pleiades.
marshallese.celestron_starsense_explorer_102_or_or: Celestron StarSense Explorer 102 ak Orion 4.5" Newtonian.
marshallese.celestron_nexstar_8se_or_apertura_ad8_: Celestron NexStar 8SE ak Apertura AD8 Dobsonian.
marshallese.local_astronomy_club: Kumi in alwōj iju ilo jikin
marshallese.most_cities_have_one_members_lend_scop: Eḷaptata jikin kweilọk ewōr aer juon. Uwaan ro rej leḷọk telescope, katakin, im kōṃṃan kweilọk in alwōj iju.
marshallese.drive_30_min_from_city_lights_maine_is: Kattōr 30+ minit ettoḷọk jān meram in jikin kweilọk. Elōñ ilo Maine. Katahdin Woods and Waters ej juon jikin mejatoto emarok eṃōj kaṃoole.
marshallese.most_important_tool_dark_sky_light_pol: Kein jerbal eḷaptata tokjān: mejatoto emarok. Meram eḷap ej jako kake 90% in iju ko. Katahdin Woods and Waters NM im AMC Maine Woods rej jikin International Dark Sky eṃōj kaṃooli; Acadia im Baxter barāinwōt ewōr aer mejatoto emarok eṃṃan.
marshallese.star_s_fate_depends_on_mass_brown_dwar: Jeṃḷọken an juon iju ej pād ioon eddo: brown dwarf, white dwarf, iju neutron, ak rọñ emarok.
marshallese.how_a_star_dies_depends_almost_entirel: Ekōjkan an juon iju mej enañin aolepen ej pād ioon eddo eo an ṃoktata. Tōrerein ikōtaan iju neutron + rọñ emarok jejjab lukkuun jeḷā (tōrerein Tolman-Oppenheimer-Volkoff ~2-3 M☉ ñan ṃōttan eo ej pād wōt).
marshallese.cosmic_distance_reference: 📏 Kein Joñe Tōḷọk ilo Laḷ In
marshallese.from_1km_to_93_billion_light_years_ref: Jān 1km ñan 93 bilien iiō in meram. Tebōḷ in joñan ko an laḷ in.
marshallese.distances_jump_in_scale_km_to_au_to_ly: Tōḷọk ko rej kālọk ilo joñan: km ñan AU ñan ly ñan bilien ly. Kajjojo jekjek ej ~10,000-100,000× eḷapḷọk. Alwōj iju ej mour ilo joñan log.
marshallese.maine_night_sky_by_season: 🌲 Mejatoto in Boñ ilo Maine ilo Kajjojo Iien
marshallese.maine_has_world_class_dark_skies_what_: Maine ewōr an mejatoto emarok eṃṃantata ilo laḷ in. Ta eo kwōj pukot ilo kajjojo iien.
marshallese.maine_has_fantastic_dark_skies_especia: Maine ewōr an mejatoto emarok eṃṃan otem ṃṃan — eḷaptata ilo eañ in jikin kweilọk ko. Katahdin Woods and Waters NM im AMC Maine Woods rej jikin International Dark Sky eṃōj kaṃooli; Acadia, Allagash, Baxter, im Cobscook barāinwōt relukkuun marok. Boñ ko ilo iien piọ reaetok + rekanooj alikkar.
marshallese.space_news_timeline: 📰 Iien ko ilo Nuuj in Mejatoto
marshallese.major_space_missions_events_2024_2027_: Jerbal + men ko reḷap ilo mejatoto 2024-2027. Jej mour ilo iien ko rekaitoklimo.
marshallese.space_exploration_is_in_a_renaissance_: Etale mejatoto ej bar jino. Aelōñ ko rekāāl (India, Japan, UAE), kamboan ko rekāāl (SpaceX, Blue Origin), jerbal ko rekāāl (Europa Clipper, Artemis, JWST). Reilōñ — im lale eṃṃan.
marshallese.quick_reference_summary_of_solar_syste: Juon tebōḷ eṃōkaj kōn kobban solar system + ekōjkan an eddo eo pojak.
marshallese.the_sun_contains_99_86_of_all_solar_sy: Aḷ ewōr 99.86% in aolepān eddo in solar system. Jupiter ej bōk ruo ṃōttan jilu in 0.14% eo ej pād wōt. Laḷ + aolep men ko jet rej ṃōttan eo ej pād wōt.
marshallese.from_our_own_luna_to_triton_enceladus_: Jān Luna eo ad ñan Triton + Enceladus. Jet reḷapḷọk jān Mercury.
marshallese.most_spectacular_moons_in_the_solar_sy: Allōñ ko reaiboojoj tata ilo solar system. Elōñ reḷapḷọk jān Pluto. Europa + Enceladus + Titan ewōr aer lọjet iuṃwin kil im rej jikin ko reḷaptata ñan astrobiology.
marshallese.astronomers_report_everything_in_utc_t: Ri-alwōj iju rej ba aolep men ilo UTC. Kōmeḷeḷe kōn time zone.
marshallese.utc_coordinated_universal_time_is_the_: UTC (Coordinated Universal Time) ej kein joñe an aolepān laḷ. Ej pād ioon awa in atom.
marshallese.astronomers_report_events_in_utc_so_ob: Ri-alwōj iju rej ba men ko ilo UTC bwe jikin alwōj ipeḷaakin laḷ ren maroñ keidi. SpaceX ej jino ilo UTC. Jerbal ko an NASA rej ilo UTC.
marshallese.maine_utc_5_est_or_utc_4_edt_london_ut: Maine: UTC-5 (EST) ak UTC-4 (EDT). London: UTC+0 (GMT) ak UTC+1 (BST). Japan: UTC+9.
marshallese.tip_when_you_read_an_astronomy_event_t: Naan in kōjeḷā: ñe kwōj riit juon iien in men ilo alwōj iju, iien otemjej lale eḷaññe ej ilo UTC ak ilo iien in jikin eo aṃ.
marshallese.utc_replaced_gmt_in_1972_based_on_atom: UTC ear pinej jenkwan GMT ilo 1972. Ej pād ioon awa in atom ilo lab ko an aelōñ ipeḷaakin laḷ, im rej bwini lukwōn. Rej kobaik second ko ñe eaikuj.
marshallese.40_interactive_tools_to_explore_in_thi: 40+ kein jerbal ñan etale ilo app in. Kajjojo ej kōpeḷḷọk juon wūntō ekāāl ñan men ko an laḷ in.

marshallese.15_cosmic_experiences_worth_chasing_mo: 15 men ko an laḷ in eṃṃan aer pukot. Eḷaptata ejjeḷọk oṇāer + kwōj maroñ tōpari.
marshallese.15_cosmic_experiences_worth_chasing_mo_2: 15 men ko an laḷ in eṃṃan aer pukot. Eḷaptata ejjeḷọk aer oṇāān, iien wōt. Mejatoto in boñ ejjeḷọk an kajjitōk jān eok — etal im iioone.
marshallese.12_facts_that_defy_what_you_think_you_: 12 men ko rej jelṃae ta ko kwōj ḷōmṇak kwōj jeḷā kōn planet ko.
marshallese.12_things_that_surprise_people_about_o: 12 men ko rej kabwilōñlōñ armej kōn solar system eo ad. Kajjojo ej jelṃae wāween eo jej ḷōmṇak kake.
marshallese.pioneer_plaques_voyager_golden_records: Plaque in Pioneer + Golden Record an Voyager + Naan in Arecibo — kakōḷḷe an armej ñan jabdewōt eo ej roñjake.
marshallese.gold_anodized_aluminum_on_pioneer_10_1: Aluminium eṃōj kōṃṃane kōn gold ioon Pioneer 10 + 11. Ej kwaḷọk armej rejjeḷọk aer nuknuk, jikin Laḷ, im hydrogen.
marshallese.phonograph_record_on_voyager_1_2_115_p: Juon record in phonograph ioon Voyager 1 + 2. 115 pija, al (Beethoven ñan Chuck Berry), yokwe ilo 55 kajin, im ainikien ko an Laḷ.
marshallese.radio_broadcast_to_globular_cluster_m1: Juon jilkinḷọk in radio ñan bwij in iju M13. Enaaj tōpare ilo ~25,000 iiō.
marshallese.carl_sagan_frank_drake_linda_salzman_s: Carl Sagan + Frank Drake + Linda Salzman Sagan + elōñ ro jet raar kōṃṃani. Kumi in Voyager Record ear pād ippān Ann Druyan — im wave ko an bōran rej pād ilo record eo.
